description_long: This is a freestanding, multi-tiered metal shelving unit designed for storage and display, commonly found in urban retail or commercial environments. The frame is constructed from dark metal with cross-bracing on the sides for added stability. The shelves are flat and open, allowing for easy access and visibility of the stored items. The unit is currently stocked with various boxed and packaged goods, including Lotus Biscoff and Nestlé Fitness cereal boxes, as well as yellow snack packs on the top shelf. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and durability, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. The open structure and robust build make it suitable for high-traffic areas such as sidewalks, convenience stores, or garages.
description: A sturdy, open metal shelving unit with multiple tiers, stocked with boxed and packaged goods. It features a dark metal frame with cross-bracing and is designed for accessible storage and display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the shelves, cross-bracing, and the arrangement of yellow snack packs on the top shelf.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full array of boxed goods and snack packs, with all shelves clearly visible and accessible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the cross-bracing and the alignment of products on the shelves.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the shelving unit and the arrangement of products, with the cross-bracing structure visible.
